response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptional engineer with 15+ years of proven expertise in infrastructure, cloud platforms, and technical leadership. However, this Principal Engineer role specifically emphasizes AI strategy and recognized AI product expertise. His current work on AI infrastructure at re:cinq (started April 2025) is recent and promising, but the resume lacks the demonstrated AI platform building, machine learning products, or AI strategic thinking that the role fundamentally requires at the principal level. He's a strong fit for a general principal engineer role but has a meaningful gap for an AI-specialized position.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering across full stack, infrastructure, and cloud domains with proven technical leadership at staff level
Deep cloud and infrastructure expertise including AWS CDK, Kubernetes deployment at scale, CI/CD, and systems handling millions of requests per second
Demonstrated ability to inspire and teach through workshops, courses, and building open-source platforms (GISCollective) used by real organizations
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML expertise — current AI infrastructure work at re:cinq began April 2025, with no prior AI platform development or recognized AI products on resume
No advanced degree in AI/ML fields (Master's or PhD), which is preferred for a principal-level AI strategy role requiring deep domain expertise
Entrepreneurial experience limited to open-source projects rather than startup growth/scaling, missing the preferred 'entrepreneurial or startup experience within larger organizations' profile
